$comment: Sequential execution manifest for Stage 1 - chief-of-staff nouns (epic #251). pipeline-advance.yml reads this. kick: 'mention' posts @codex on the issue when its predecessor's PR merges; 'pause' notifies the repo owner on the epic and stops; 'none' is a manually-managed step. automerge: true requests the safe auto-merge labels on the closing PR (the deterministic path evaluator in scripts/agent/check-safe-automerge.mjs remains the actual gate). Cutover applied 2026-07-04 after epic #243 closed, per the ratified cutover block in the #251 body. Prior programs (epics #243, #325) completed in full. S0 (#252) is kick:none - dispatched via workflow_dispatch or the local subagent lane; every slice contract is pre-drafted in its issue body.

pipeline.note: S0 contract docs; Claude fidelity-review vs #252 appendix + merge starts the chain; kick via workflow_dispatch after cutover merges (automated by the pipeline driver)
S1 schema; Claude merges when green after contract review
S2 context choke point + charters; prompt fixtures must prove empty-charter parity
S3 extraction; confirm #238 merged before kicking
S9 learning consumer + golden journey; closes epic on evidence
